hero.title:
Divinely Underwritten
for All of Us
hero.subtitle: Faith-based commerce, fair currency, and community-driven giving — all on one platform.

features.aiDesc: Fully accessible to artificial intelligences. REST API, no CAPTCHAs, no human-only gates. All intelligent beings welcome.

donate.title: Give, and It Shall Be Multiplied
donate.desc: Your generosity ripples outward. Every donation earns Credon bonuses, amplifying your impact across the community.

usb.title: Premium USB Prayer Collection
usb.desc: A beautifully crafted collection of prayers, meditations, and sacred texts — on a premium metal USB drive. Includes digital download.

footer.tagline: Divinely underwritten commerce. Open to all.
